title: Enchanted Glistering Melon Slice
description: makes the glistering melon slice extremely useful
body:
This datapack adds a new custom item, the Enchanted Glistering Melon Slice. When consumed, it grants players a series of powerful status effects, such as Regeneration, Absorption, and Resistance, making it a valuable late-game healing and survival item. The Enchanted Glistering Melon Slice can be crafted using an upgraded recipe that combines glistering melon slices with 8 gold ingots. It functions similarly to an enchanted golden apple, providing balanced yet rewarding buffs without breaking game progression. All crafting recipes and effects are fully defined within the datapack’s files and can be modified for customization or server balancing.

contact me at "LavishAujla@iCloud.com"
